It’s their mission to make clean power accessible across the world.  04.02.2025  5 min read   Business   How businesses and farmers can secure big discounts on new green finance   Australian manufacturers, businesses, agribusinesses and farmers will be able to secure interest rate discounts and lower borrowing costs as part of a $300 million co-finance program between NAB and CEFC.  31.01.2025  3 min read   Economy   NAB forecasts February rate cut: cutting phase to be gradual   NAB Economics now expects the RBA to gradually ease rates from February, as outlined in the latest NAB Monetary Policy Update.  30.01.2025  1 min read   Business   Australian Open 2025 serves up a grand slam for Melbourne’s economy   28.01.2025  3 min read   Business   Why business owners say 2025 is their make-or-break ‘year of tech’   27.01.2025  4 min read   Best in Business   Islamic finance surges as NAB extends eligibility   17.01.2025  3 min read   Economy   “It’s called the lucky country for a reason” NAB CEO Andrew Irvine on housing, AI and productivity   13.01.2025  3 min read   Business   Business   NAB accelerates EV adoption through strategic partnerships.   19.12.2024  1 min read   Economy   Economy   NAB Group CEO on the 2025 economic outlook   In his economic outlook for 2025, NAB Group CEO Andrew Irvine shared his optimism the tide would start to turn, with measured growth for the year ahead predicted.  06.01.2025  3 min read   Quick links  Business Research and Insights  For more economic news, insights and analysis, visit NAB’s Business Research and Insights   Notifications
